title: post-deploy UI cleanup
description:
## Summary

- **Remove HelpPanel** from Admin + Portal layouts — it was non-functional (no content) and visually overlapping with the BugReportWidget
- **Remove Projekte sidebar entry** — projects were consolidated into the Tickets system (`type=project`); the duplicate nav entry is gone
- **Drop push-to-talk** from AssistantChat — voice recording was added but not wanted; the mic button and all MediaRecorder code are removed
- **Add Schlagwort input** to the tickets filter form — the `tag` URL parameter was supported in the backend but had no text input in the UI; you can now type a tag name directly without having to click a chip
- **Make e2e-smoke non-blocking** — adds `continue-on-error: true` to the CI job while prod cluster connectivity is being confirmed (closes #580)

Closes #580

## Test plan

- [ ] Admin sidebar shows Tickets but no Projekte
- [ ] No floating `?` help button appears in admin or portal
- [ ] AssistantChat (when enabled) shows only text input, no microphone button
- [ ] Tickets filter form has a Schlagwort field; typing a tag name and clicking Filtern filters the list
- [ ] CI e2e-smoke failures no longer block PR merges

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/claude-code)
